agent_results.root_cause: 1 client (cli_ju140yu0) experiencing high latency. Likely isolated — heavy task or degraded network.
agent_results.immediate_action: Monitor the specific client. If persistent, ask client to retry with lighter tasks.
preventive_measures: Set server-side timeout limits per task type.
Add latency-based session prioritization (deprioritize high-latency clients).
Profile task execution times and set SLO budgets.
Implement heartbeat timeouts to detect and evict stale sessions.

executed_actions.description: Latency watchdog reset — monitoring response times
executed_actions.result: Alert condition resolved. System returning to normal.
